_comment: Copy to .cursor/mcp.json (gitignored) and replace RELAY_PATH with your platform relay binary. Unity installs the relay to ~/.unity/relay/ when the Editor starts with com.unity.ai.assistant. Prefer Edit > Project Settings > AI > Unity MCP > Integrations > Configure for Cursor when available.

project-twelve-ingame-mcp._note: Requires the game running in Play Mode or a desktop build. Binds to 127.0.0.1 only.

project-twelve-fff-mcp._note: Fast file search for agents (ffgrep, fffind, fff-multi-grep). Install: https://github.com/dmtrKovalenko/fff — Windows: irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dmtrKovalenko/fff/main/install-mcp.ps1 | iex; Unix: curl -L https://dmtrkovalenko.dev/install-fff-mcp.sh | bash. Requires fff-mcp on PATH (or set command to the full binary path). Use --no-warmup so Cursor does not time out during the initial index scan; pass the repo root as the positional PATH arg.

pixellab._note: Pixel art generation (Vibe Coding). Put PIXELLAB_API_KEY in repo-root .env (gitignored) and mirror it to the User environment so Cursor can resolve ${env:…} for HTTP MCP (envFile only works for stdio). Token: https://www.pixellab.ai/mcp — Skill: .claude/skills/pixellab-mcp/SKILL.md

project-twelve-graphify-mcp._note: Local Graphify knowledge-graph MCP. Build graphify-out/graph.json first: uv tool install "graphifyy[mcp]" && graphify extract . --code-only. Launcher fails clearly if the graph is missing. Skill: .claude/skills/graphify/SKILL.md
